title: Securidaca schlechtendaliana
taxonomy: Securidaca schlechtendaliana is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It belongs to the genus Securidaca, which is a group of plants that are native to tropical Africa. The Polygalaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as milkworts, with over 850 species worldwide. Securidaca schlechtendaliana is a member of this family due to its similarities in flower structure and growth habits.
